posts.title: Why Ijen Trekking Requires a Medical Checkup — And What Actually Happens
posts.seo_description: Before you hike Kawah Ijen, a local health certificate is mandatory for every guest under BBKSDA regulations. Here's what the screening involves, who issues it, and what happens if you don't pass.

posts.title: Your Complete Kawah Ijen Guide: Blue Fire, Health & Safety
posts.seo_description: Everything you need to know before hiking Kawah Ijen — blue fire timing, health requirements, safety zones, and what to expect from a police-led private tour.
